data.name: MergeOfferTitle
data.value: We found another account with this external login

data.name: MergeOfferMessage
data.value: The {0} login you just confirmed is already linked to another account ({1}).

data.name: MergeOfferDetails
data.value: Because you confirmed the external login and your current account uses the same email, you can safely merge the accounts. The other account will be removed and its donation, subscription, and campaign history will move to the account you are signed into now.

data.name: LinkConflictGeneric
data.value: This external login is already linked to another account and cannot be attached to your current account automatically.

data.name: LinkConflictEmailMismatch
data.value: The email confirmed by {0} ({1}) does not match the account you are signed into. For security, automatic merge is not available.

data.name: LinkConflictProtectedAccount
data.value: One of the accounts involved has administrative permissions. For security, automatic merge is not available.

data.name: LinkConflictMissingExternalEmail
data.value: {0} did not provide a verifiable email address, so we cannot confirm both accounts belong to the same person.

data.name: LinkConflictSolutionSignInWithProvider
data.value: Sign in directly with {0} to access the account that already has this login linked.

data.name: LinkConflictSolutionUseMatchingEmail
data.value: Sign in with the local account that uses the same email confirmed by the external provider, then link {0} again.

data.name: LinkConflictSolutionRemoveFromOtherAccount
data.value: If you can access the other account, remove {0} under Settings > External logins on that account and try again here.
